subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: They see from their own standpoint. But these people are pure in heart and simple in spirit; therefore, though not intellectually advanced, they are capable of grasping their portion of truth, for truth is for all.
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @limits of the intellect, @universality of the Cause
